title: Company Names Tribunal decision: Temu Limited
body: "Application number 5171  Applicant Five Bells Limited and Whaleco UK Limited objected to the name used by Temu Limited under the Companies Act 2006.  This decision was undefended. ‘Undefended’ refers to decisions where there has been no defence in response to the application to the Company Names Tribunal.  Signed order  On the 24 April 2025 the adjudicator hereby gives notice under sections 73(4) and (5) of the Companies Act 2006 that the company name of Temu Limited is changed to 15094883, Ltd. "
